review: clawd-cursor is an exceptionally well-engineered skill. The 5-layer pipeline, multi-provider support (including free Ollama), 3-tier safety approval system, and thorough documentation set a high bar for the catalog. REST API hard-binds to 127.0.0.1; screenshots stay in memory. Fills a genuine capability gap â€” GUI automation unavailable through any OpenClaw native tool. No blocking issues.
